subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abha Beauty! For some time no message or word hath been received from thee. I know thou wilt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی چندی است که پیامی و کلامی از شما نرسیده است میدانم خواهید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
